summary: Profile page settings testing completed. All features working correctly - profile display, edit mode, name/email update, phone read-only, password change with validation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns user profile info (id, name, email, phone, role)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - updates name only
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - updates email only
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - updates both name and email
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - rejects empty name (returns 400)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - requires authentication (returns 401)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile - rejects duplicate email (returns 400)
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password - rejects wrong current password (returns 400)
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password - rejects short new password < 6 chars (returns 400)
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password - requires authentication (returns 401)
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password - successful password change and revert
Frontend: Profile page loads with user info (name, email, phone, role)
Frontend: Edit button opens edit mode with input fields
Frontend: Phone number is read-only in edit mode (displayed as text)
Frontend: Cancel button reverts to display mode
Frontend: Save button updates profile via API
Frontend: Avatar initial updates dynamically in edit mode
Frontend: Display name updates in real-time during editing
Frontend: Password change section opens on button click
Frontend: Wrong current password shows error toast
Frontend: Short new password shows error toast
Frontend: Cancel password change closes the form
critical_code_review_comments: Profile update correctly validates empty name and duplicate email
Password change validates current password and minimum length (6 chars)
Phone number is correctly read-only - no input field in edit mode
Avatar initial dynamically updates based on edited name (line 145 in ProfilePage.js)
All UI text is in Hindi as required
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile page fully tested. PUT /api/auth/profile updates name and email. POST /api/auth/change-password changes password. Phone is read-only. Avatar initial updates dynamically in edit mode. All error messages are in Hindi.
